mapper.sql: SORTID, TITLE, CTIME, STEMFROM, USER_ID, IMAGE, SHORTCONTENT, CONTENT, HIDE, WEIGHT, LIKES, LIKEUSERS, STATE, TARGET, NEWS_TIPOFFS, NEWS_ID
mapper.update:
update
set SORTID = #{SORTID}, TITLE = #{TITLE}, STEMFROM = #{STEMFROM}, IMAGE = #{IMAGE}, SHORTCONTENT = #{SHORTCONTENT}, CONTENT = #{CONTENT}, HIDE = #{HIDE}, WEIGHT = #{WEIGHT}, LIKES = #{LIKES}, LIKEUSERS = #{LIKEUSERS}, STATE = #{STATE}, TARGET = #{TARGET}, NEWS_TIPOFFS = #{NEWS_TIPOFFS}, NEWS_ID = NEWS_ID where NEWS_ID = #{NEWS_ID}
